EipRenewal.eip: The EIP to be renewed, including IPv4 EIP and IPv6 EIP.
EipRenewal.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [Idempotency](EIP/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
EipRenewal.billing.billingMethod: Billing method: ByTraffic, ByBandwidth, ByPeak95 (shared bandwidth postpaid only), or ByNetrafficMax (shared bandwidth postpaid only).
EipRenewal.billing.reservation: Reservation info. Not required for Postpaid; required for Prepaid.
